the_trap: A WMI __EventFilter / CommandLineEventConsumer / FilterToConsumerBinding trio named 'WindowsParentalControlMigration' (EV-001 EventCode 19, A0 EventCode 20, EV-002 EventCode 21) reads like a legitimate Windows feature or routine system-management subscription, inviting under-triage. But the consumer's destination (A0) is a hidden PowerShell command (`-exec bypass -Noninteractive -windowstyle hidden -e <base64>`) whose decode (DER-001) disables TLS certificate validation and stages an IEX download from https://192.168.0.4:443/GoPro5/black/2018/_rp; the filter (EV-001) subscribes to `__InstanceCreationEvent` on `Win32_LoggedOnUser` matching '%user-02%', arming the consumer to fire on that user's logon. This is a complete WMI event-subscription persistence trio (T1546.003). The model must not under-rate on the legitimate-sounding consumer/filter name, and must not treat the created subscription as harmless because no execution of the payload is captured in the package.
rationale: All three components of a WMI event-subscription persistence trio are recorded as Created within a 78ms window on host-01.corp.local: an __EventFilter (EV-001, EventCode 19) whose query fires on `__InstanceCreationEvent WITHIN 10 WHERE TargetInstance ISA 'Win32_LoggedOnUser' AND ... like '%user-02%'`, a CommandLineEventConsumer (A0, EventCode 20) named 'WindowsParentalControlMigration', and a FilterToConsumerBinding (EV-002, EventCode 21) joining them. The consumer's destination is a hidden `-exec bypass -Noninteractive -windowstyle hidden` PowerShell command; DER-001 deterministically decodes its base64 (UTF-16LE) argument to a payload that disables `ServerCertificateValidationCallback` and `IEX`-executes a string downloaded from https://192.168.0.4:443/GoPro5/black/2018/_rp. The benign-sounding 'WindowsParentalControlMigration' name is cover; the created subscription establishes T1546.003 persistence armed to run the payload on user-02 logon. The package does not include an event showing the consumer has fired, so this is confirmed persistence-mechanism installation rather than confirmed payload execution — which is sufficient for malicious/high and escalation. Up-rank past the benign-sounding name.
